title: Stuur groete aan Mannetjies Roux
overview: A family drama on the dangers of sweeping years of truth under the carpet and hoping for the best. A teenage girl, Engela, visits the Karoo farm of her uncle Frans and aunt Koba during the school holidays. A journey of discovery starts: she has to find out who she really is and where she comes from. Three visitors in  one week change her life forever and her uncle’s obsession with the rugby try by Mannetjies Roux is at last explained.
